mapper.insert: insert into setmeal ( id, category_id, `name`, price, `status`, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user ) values ( #{id}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{status}, #{description}, #{image}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update:
update setmeal
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
status = #{status},
description = #{description},
image = #{image},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from setmeal where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT sd.id, sd.setmeal_id, sd.dish_id, sd.name, sd.price, sd.copies FROM sky_take_out.setmeal_dish sd WHERE sd.setmeal_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO setmeal ( name, price, status, category_id, description, image ) VALUES ( #{setmeal.name}, #{setmeal.price}, #{setmeal.status}, #{setmeal.categoryId}, #{setmeal.description}, #{setmeal.image} )

INSERT INTO setmeal_dish ( setmeal_id, dish_id, name, price, copies ) VALUES
(#{setId}, #{dish.dishId}, #{dish.name}, #{dish.price}, #{dish.copies})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM setmeal WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1

SELECT s.id, s.category_id, s.`name`, s.price, s.`status`, s.description, s.image, s.update_time, c.`name` AS category_name FROM sky_take_out.setmeal s LEFT JOIN sky_take_out.category c ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
